# DA-Proj1

## Entrega Final
Para a entrega de dia 30 de Março, o ficheiro ZIP deve conter:
* **Code folder**: Program source code.
* **Documentation folder**: HTML documentation generated by Doxygen.
* **Presentation file**: PDF format for the demonstration.

## Estrutura do Projeto
```text
1proj/
├── data/           # Input datasets (.csv files)
├── docs/           # Doxygen generated documentation (Git ignored)
├── include/        # Header files (.h)
├── src/            # Implementation files (.cpp)
├── main.cpp        # Entry point
├── CMakeLists.txt  # Build configuration
├── Doxyfile        # Doxygen configuration
└── .gitignore      # Git ignore rules
